reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The gluten-free empanada options were excellent, and the service and care in handling the food were outstanding. I recommend adding gluten-free sandwiches to the menu.

reviews.comment:
Muy mala la atencion en el full, habia dos empleados uno en cada caja, con su mirada en la computadora y ni siquiera dijeron buen dia, ademas de esperar que terminen su trabajo para levantar la vista y ni siquiera preguntar que queriamos, solo entregue mi producto y ahi me dijeron el monto, cobraron y nada mas. Sinceramente malisima atencion!

(Translated by Google)
The service at the full checkout was terrible. There were two employees, one at each register, both staring at their computers. They didn't even say good morning, and they waited until we finished their work before looking up. They didn't even ask what we wanted. I just handed over my item, they told me the price, took my money, and that was it. Honestly, the service was awful!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25OdmNsWmtTME14VVZaV2RGUmhTekJFVTI1emVuYxAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre hago una parada técnica para tomar un café o comer algo también ese descanso lo aprovecho para que mi perro baje, olfateo y estire sus articulaciones. En el bar Full atienden bien y son amables.

(Translated by Google)
I always make a pit stop for coffee or a bite to eat, and I also use that break to let my dog ​​out, sniff around, and stretch his joints. The service at Full Bar is good and the staff are friendly.
